Never Back Down (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $24,850,922Details
International Box Office $14,468,879
Worldwide Box Office $39,319,801
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $21,347,551
Total $21,347,551
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,603,195 (34.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.89 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:63.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$21,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,729 opening theaters/2,729 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $41,395,127

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 14th, 2008 (Wide) by Summit Entertainment
Video Release: July 29th, 2008 by Summit Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for mature thematic material involving intense sequences of fighting/violence, some sexuality, partying and language - all involving teens.
Running Time: 113 minutes
Franchise: Never Back Down
Plot point: Death of a Sibling, Dysfunctional Family, Love Triangle, Martial Arts, New Guy/Girl in School, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Tournament, Underground / Illegal Fighting, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Sports Action
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Summit Entertainment, Mandalay Independent, BMP Inc
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
